plugins.name: agentic-notebook
plugins.description: Source-grounded, NotebookLM-style research notebook over any local folder of documents — grounded Q&A with verifiable citations, plus study guides, briefing docs, mind maps, podcast scripts and more.

plugins.name: agentic-notebook-mini
plugins.description: Small-model, context-frugal variant of agentic-notebook tuned for local 7-14B models (Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, OpenCode) with limited context windows.
